plugin.name: Message_Router
plugin.author: Nick Gammon (merged by Claude)
plugin.purpose: Routes tells and channels to miniwindows with logging
plugin.description:
Combined message router for ZombieMUD.
Displays different message types in floating miniwindows: - Channels -> draggable miniwindow (top-right by default) - Tells -> draggable miniwindow (bottom-right by default)
Features: - Automatic logging to ZombieMush/Logs/ directory (Discord bot compatible) - Supports all bracket types: [], {}, <> - Separate active/last log files - Optional bell sound on incoming tells - Timezone-aware logging - Windows are draggable and remember position across sessions - Windows register with the ZombieMUD miniwindow manager if it is loaded
Aliases: - msgwin : toggle both windows on/off - msgreset : swap the window positions - msgsize target W R : resize channels/tells/both to width W and R visible rows - msglog [on|off] : show or change file logging - msglogpath : show the current log folder and filename prefix - msgcopylog [target] [lines] : copy recent tells/window history - msgbell [on|off] : show or change tell bell sound - msgtimestamp [format] : show or change miniwindow timestamps - msgchannel allow x : allow <x> as a real channel - msgchannel block x : stop <x> from routing as a channel - msgchannel unblock x: remove a custom block - msgchannels : list custom channel routing changes
Configuration: - bell_on_tell: Play sound on incoming tell (default: 0 = off) - log_messages: Enable/disable logging (default: 1 = on) - timestamp_format: Miniwindow timestamp format (default: [%H:%M:%S] )

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
-- ==================== CONFIGURATION ====================
local ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID = "11e1d11e4a0d932dd870363f" local register_with_window_manager local boost_window
local function window_manager_locked() if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then local ok, result, value = pcall(CallPlugin, ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, "isLocked", "") if ok then return value == "1" or result == "1" end end return false end
local function call_window_manager(function_name) if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then local ok, err = pcall(CallPlugin, ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, function_name, "") if ok then return true end ColourNote("red", "", "[Message Router] Window manager call failed: " .. tostring(err)) return false end ColourNote("yellow", "", "[Message Router] ZombieMUD Miniwindow Manager is not loaded.") return false end
-- Whitelist of valid channel names for angle bracket <> format -- This prevents item buffs like <bound> from being mistaken for channels angle_bracket_channels = { -- Guild channels ["abjurer"] = true, ["artiste"] = true, ["baba"] = true, ["balance"] = true, ["bard"] = true, ["chaos"] = true, ["cleric"] = true, ["company"] = true, ["dk"] = true, ["druid"] = true, ["fighter"] = true, ["healer"] = true, ["loc"] = true, ["mage"] = true, ["monk"] = true, ["myrmidon"] = true, ["necro"] = true, ["order"] = true, ["paladin"] = true, ["psionicist"] = true, ["ranger"] = true, ["samurai"] = true, ["spellblade"] = true, ["trader"] = true, ["warder"] = true, ["warlock"] = true, -- Prestige/Race/War channels ["prestige"] = true, ["legion"] = true, ["seraph"] = true, ["cruoris"] = true, -- Public channels ["alert"] = true, ["anomaly"] = true, ["bolo"] = true, ["chat"] = true, ["chess"] = true, ["cruise"] = true, ["deaths"] = true, ["elf"] = true, ["fin"] = true, ["frags"] = true, ["gobo"] = true, ["gym"] = true, ["hifi"] = true, ["ifin"] = true, ["imud"] = true, ["ister"] = true, ["juopot"] = true, ["kfm"] = true, ["legends"] = true, ["linux"] = true, ["lord"] = true, ["movie"] = true, ["mud"] = true, ["mudlet"] = true, ["music"] = true, ["newbie"] = true, ["nhl"] = true, ["nt"] = true, ["ogre"] = true, ["omx"] = true, ["orc"] = true, ["oz"] = true, ["reincs"] = true, ["sales"] = true, ["tec"] = true, ["tf"] = true, ["travel"] = true, ["trigs"] = true, ["trivia"] = true, ["troll"] = true, ["wow"] = true, ["xmud"] = true, ["za"] = true, -- Read-only channels ["info"] = true, ["inform"] = true, ["newsbot"] = true, ["tv"] = true, ["tv+"] = true, -- Private channels (commonly used) ["abyss"] = true, ["au"] = true, ["beoutch"] = true, ["ber"] = true, ["bong"] = true, ["bore"] = true, ["bruha"] = true, ["cb"] = true, ["cid"] = true, ["cm"] = true, ["cow"] = true, ["curse"] = true, ["de"] = true, ["dogs"] = true, ["dtest"] = true, ["dutchman"] = true, ["dzone"] = true, ["eqq"] = true, ["espoo"] = true, ["fj"] = true, ["flex"] = true, ["gc"] = true, ["gl"] = true, ["glance"] = true, ["hb"] = true, ["hc"] = true, ["hemet"] = true, ["highbie"] = true, ["hmm"] = true, ["hop"] = true, ["jaeger"] = true, ["jax"] = true, ["jes"] = true, ["jop"] = true, ["kala"] = true, ["keke"] = true, ["kepustan+"] = true, ["keu"] = true, ["kiq"] = true, ["kobah"] = true, ["kramma"] = true, ["kyat"] = true, ["kyax"] = true, ["lt"] = true, ["mexx"] = true, ["mjp"] = true, ["molo"] = true, ["murre"] = true, ["myyra"] = true, ["nb"] = true, ["nectest"] = true, ["nif"] = true, ["nin"] = true, ["oit"] = true, ["om"] = true, ["omo"] = true, ["oo"] = true, ["oops"] = true, ["osmo"] = true, ["peppu"] = true, ["pesamieli"] = true, ["pits"] = true, ["poker"] = true, ["poo"] = true, ["pop"] = true, ["por"] = true, ["pore"] = true, ["q"] = true, ["rh"] = true, ["rip"] = true, ["routa"] = true, ["saludo"] = true, ["scc"] = true, ["sick"] = true, ["sieni"] = true, ["sisu"] = true, ["slayer"] = true, ["soc"] = true, ["soctest"] = true, ["sodom"] = true, ["sorc"] = true, ["sr"] = true, ["swe"] = true, ["tampere"] = true, ["teeve"] = true, ["thc"] = true, ["tre"] = true, ["turku"] = true, ["uli"] = true, ["usa"] = true, ["vermis"] = true, ["war"] = true, ["wol"] = true, ["wolf"] = true, ["x"] = true, ["xx"] = true, ["xxx"] = true, ["z"] = true, ["zom"] = true, }
local custom_angle_channels = {} local blocked_angle_channels = {}
local function trim(text) return (text or ""):match("^%s*(.-)%s*$") end
local function copy_styles(styles) local out = {} for _, seg in ipairs(styles or {}) do out[#out + 1] = { text = seg.text or "", textcolour = seg.textcolour, backcolour = seg.backcolour, style = seg.style, length = seg.length, } end return out end
local function split_words(text) local out = {} for item in string.gmatch(text or "", "[^,]+") do item = trim(item):lower() if item ~= "" then out[item] = true end end return out end
local function join_keys(t) local keys = {} for k, v in pairs(t) do if v then keys[#keys + 1] = k end end table.sort(keys) return table.concat(keys, ",") end
local function load_channel_overrides() custom_angle_channels = split_words(GetVariable("custom_angle_channels")) blocked_angle_channels = split_words(GetVariable("blocked_angle_channels")) end
local function save_channel_overrides() SetVariable("custom_angle_channels", join_keys(custom_angle_channels)) SetVariable("blocked_angle_channels", join_keys(blocked_angle_channels)) end
local function current_timestamp() if timestamp_format == "" then return "" end local ok, stamp = pcall(os.date, timestamp_format) if ok and stamp then return stamp end return "" end
local function set_timestamp_choice(format, label) timestamp_format = format or "" SetVariable("timestamp_format", timestamp_format) ColourNote("cyan", "", "[Message Router] Miniwindow timestamps: " .. label) end
local function is_angle_channel(channel_name) channel_name = (channel_name or ""):lower() if blocked_angle_channels[channel_name] then return false end return angle_bracket_channels[channel_name] or custom_angle_channels[channel_name] end
-- Play bell sound on incoming tell (0 = off, 1 = on) bell_on_tell = tonumber(GetVariable("bell_on_tell")) or 0
-- Enable logging (0 = off, 1 = on) log_messages = tonumber(GetVariable("log_messages")) or 1
-- Timestamp format for messages shown in miniwindows. Use empty string or "off" to disable. timestamp_format = GetVariable("timestamp_format") or "[%H:%M:%S] " if timestamp_format == "off" then timestamp_format = "" end
-- Logs directory relative to MUSHclient install log_directory = "ZombieMush\\Logs\\"
-- Time zone offset from zombiemud server in seconds zombie_time_zone_offset = 21600
-- ==================== MINIWINDOW CONFIGURATION ====================
local CH_WIN = "msg_router_channels_" .. GetPluginID() local TE_WIN = "msg_router_tells_" .. GetPluginID()
local DEFAULT_WIN_WIDTH = 800 local DEFAULT_VISIBLE_ROWS = 20 local MIN_WIN_WIDTH = 260 local MAX_WIN_WIDTH = 1600 local MIN_VISIBLE_ROWS = 5 local MAX_VISIBLE_ROWS = 80 local RESIZE_TAG_SIZE = 12 local SCROLL_LINES = 1 local SCROLL_DRAG_REFRESH = 0.033
local win_metrics = {} -- per-window {font_h, width, height, visible_rows, title_h} local resize_state = {} local scrollbar_drag_state = {} local last_scroll_repaint = 0
local FONT_ID = "f" local FONT_NAME = "Consolas" local FONT_SIZE = 9
local MAX_STORED = 200 -- raw messages kept in each buffer local TEXT_INSET = 3 local SCROLLBAR_W = 8 -- pixels wide for the scrollbar track
local COLOR_BG = ColourNameToRGB("black") local COLOR_BORDER = ColourNameToRGB("gray") local COLOR_TITLE = ColourNameToRGB("cyan") local COLOR_SCROLL = ColourNameToRGB("dimgray") local COLOR_THUMB = ColourNameToRGB("silver") local COLOR_THUMB_HOT = ColourNameToRGB("white") local COLOR_SELECT_BG = ColourNameToRGB("#1a3a5a") -- row selection highlight local COLOR_DEFAULT_TEXT = ColourNameToRGB("white") local COLOR_TELL_IN = ColourNameToRGB("lightskyblue") local COLOR_TELL_OUT = ColourNameToRGB("lightgreen") local COLOR_TIMESTAMP = ColourNameToRGB("dimgray")
local function stamp_display_styles(styles) local stamped = copy_styles(styles) local stamp = current_timestamp() if stamp ~= "" then table.insert(stamped, 1, { text = stamp, textcolour = COLOR_TIMESTAMP, backcolour = COLOR_BG, length = #stamp, }) end return stamped end
-- Line buffers: each entry is a styles table (array of {text, textcolour, backcolour}) local ch_lines = {} local te_lines = {}
-- Pre-expanded visual row caches â updated incrementally on each new message, reused on every scroll tick local ch_visual_rows = {} local te_visual_rows = {}
-- Parallel row-count tables: row_counts[i] = number of visual rows that lines[i] produced. -- Used to trim the exact right number of rows from the front of the cache when the oldest -- stored message is evicted because MAX_STORED is reached. local ch_row_counts = {} local te_row_counts = {}
-- Scroll offsets: 0 = showing newest (bottom); positive = scrolled up into history local ch_scroll = 0 local te_scroll = 0
-- Selection state: start/end rows are absolute visual-row indices; x values are miniwindow pixels. local ch_sel = { active = false } local te_sel = { active = false }
-- Last row seen during a drag, per window. Only redraw when the drag crosses into a new row â -- the dragmove callback fires at mouse polling rate (125-1000/sec) so this eliminates ~95% of -- redundant redraws while the mouse stays within the same font-height band. local ch_last_drag_row = nil local te_last_drag_row = nil local ch_last_drag_x = nil local te_last_drag_x = nil
-- ==================== INITIALIZATION ====================
-- Prepend with full directory structure log_directory = GetInfo(57) .. log_directory
-- Turn \ into / for lua file reading log_directory = log_directory:gsub("\\", "/") -- Store base directory (without month suffix) for dynamic month updates log_directory_base = log_directory
-- Track the last directory we actually created so we only spawn mkdir once per month local log_directory_created = ""
-- ==================== HELPER FUNCTIONS ====================
load_channel_overrides()
-- Get current log directory prefix for the current month. -- Files are written as: {log_directory_base}{YY_Mon_}active_{channel}.txt -- The month prefix is part of the filename, not a subdirectory. -- log_directory_created caches the last-seen month so this is O(1) after the first call per month. function get_log_directory() if log_messages ~= 1 then return "" end local dir = log_directory_base .. os.date("%y_%b_") log_directory_created = dir return dir end
local function clamp(value, low, high) value = tonumber(value) or low if value < low then return low end if value > high then return high end return value end
local function window_var(win_id, suffix) return "msg_router_" .. win_id .. "_" .. suffix end
local function window_height(font_h, visible_rows) return (visible_rows + 1) * font_h + TEXT_INSET * 2 end
local function rows_from_height(font_h, height) return clamp(math.floor(((tonumber(height) or 0) - TEXT_INSET * 2) / font_h) - 1, MIN_VISIBLE_ROWS, MAX_VISIBLE_ROWS) end
local function clear_table(t) for k, _ in pairs(t) do t[k] = nil end end
local function cache_tables_for_window(win_id) if win_id == CH_WIN then return ch_lines, ch_visual_rows, ch_row_counts, ch_sel end return te_lines, te_visual_rows, te_row_counts, te_sel end
local function clear_selection(win_id) if win_id == CH_WIN then ch_sel = { active = false } ch_last_drag_row = nil ch_last_drag_x = nil else te_sel = { active = false } te_last_drag_row = nil te_last_drag_x = nil end end
local function max_scroll_for_window(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] local rows = (win_id == CH_WIN) and ch_visual_rows or te_visual_rows if not m then return 0 end return math.max(0, #rows - m.visible_rows) end
local function current_scroll(win_id) return (win_id == CH_WIN) and ch_scroll or te_scroll end
local function mouse_y_in_window(win_id) local client_y = WindowInfo(win_id, 18) local window_top = WindowInfo(win_id, 11) if client_y and window_top then return client_y - window_top end return WindowInfo(win_id, 15) end
local function set_current_scroll(win_id, value) value = math.max(0, math.min(value, max_scroll_for_window(win_id))) if win_id == CH_WIN then ch_scroll = value else te_scroll = value end return value end
local function visual_rows_for_window(win_id) return (win_id == CH_WIN) and ch_visual_rows or te_visual_rows end
local function buffered_repaint(force) local now = utils.timer() if force or now - last_scroll_repaint >= SCROLL_DRAG_REFRESH then Repaint() last_scroll_repaint = now end end
local function redraw_message_window(win_id, repaint_mode) if win_id == CH_WIN then redraw_window(CH_WIN, "[ Channels ]", ch_visual_rows, ch_scroll) else redraw_window(TE_WIN, "[ Tells ]", te_visual_rows, te_scroll) end if repaint_mode then buffered_repaint(repaint_mode == "force") end end
local function scrollbar_geometry(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return nil end local left = m.width - SCROLLBAR_W - 1 local right = m.width - 1 local top = m.title_h local bottom = math.max(top + 1, m.height - RESIZE_TAG_SIZE - 1) return left, right, top, bottom end
local function scrollbar_thumb_rect(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return nil end local rows = visual_rows_for_window(win_id) local total = #rows local max_scroll = max_scroll_for_window(win_id) local left, right, top, bottom = scrollbar_geometry(win_id) if not left then return nil end
if total <= m.visible_rows or max_scroll <= 0 then return left, right, top, bottom, top, bottom, bottom - top end
local track_h = bottom - top local thumb_h = math.max(10, math.floor(track_h * m.visible_rows / total)) thumb_h = math.min(thumb_h, track_h) local travel = math.max(1, track_h - thumb_h) local thumb_frac = 1 - (current_scroll(win_id) / max_scroll) local thumb_top = top + math.floor(travel * thumb_frac) return left, right, top, bottom, thumb_top, thumb_top + thumb_h, thumb_h end
local function save_window_size(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end SetVariable(window_var(win_id, "width"), tostring(m.width)) SetVariable(window_var(win_id, "rows"), tostring(m.visible_rows)) end
local function rebuild_visual_cache(win_id) local lines, visual_rows, row_counts = cache_tables_for_window(win_id) clear_table(visual_rows) clear_table(row_counts)
for _, styles in ipairs(lines) do local rows = wrap_styles(win_id, styles) row_counts[#row_counts + 1] = #rows for _, row in ipairs(rows) do visual_rows[#visual_rows + 1] = row end end
clear_selection(win_id) set_current_scroll(win_id, current_scroll(win_id)) end
local function move_resize_hotspot(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end local id = win_id .. "_resize" local left = math.max(0, m.width - RESIZE_TAG_SIZE) local top = math.max(m.title_h, m.height - RESIZE_TAG_SIZE) if WindowMoveHotspot(win_id, id, left, top, m.width, m.height) ~= 0 then local s = win_id == CH_WIN and "ch" or "te" WindowAddHotspot(win_id, id, left, top, m.width, m.height, "", "", "on_resize_down_" .. s, "", "", "Drag to resize", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win_id, id, "on_resize_drag_" .. s, "on_resize_release_" .. s, 0) end end
local function move_title_hotspot(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end WindowMoveHotspot(win_id, "zz_mw_" .. win_id .. "_movewindow_hotspot", 0, 0, m.width, m.title_h) end
local function move_content_hotspot(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end WindowMoveHotspot(win_id, win_id .. "_scroll", 0, m.title_h, m.width - SCROLLBAR_W - 2, m.height - 1) end
local function move_scrollbar_hotspot(win_id) local left, right, top, bottom = scrollbar_geometry(win_id) if not left then return end local id = win_id .. "_scrollbar" if WindowMoveHotspot(win_id, id, left, top, right, bottom) ~= 0 then local s = win_id == CH_WIN and "ch" or "te" WindowAddHotspot(win_id, id, left, top, right, bottom, "", "", "on_scrollbar_down_" .. s, "", "on_scrollbar_up_" .. s, "Drag scrollbar to scroll history", miniwin.cursor_hand, 0) WindowDragHandler(win_id, id, "on_scrollbar_drag_" .. s, "on_scrollbar_release_" .. s, 0) WindowScrollwheelHandler(win_id, id, "on_scroll_" .. s) end end
local function draw_resize_tag(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end local right = m.width - 3 local bottom = m.height - 3 local color = ColourNameToRGB("gray") WindowLine(win_id, right - 9, bottom, right, bottom - 9, color, miniwin.pen_solid, 1) WindowLine(win_id, right - 5, bottom, right, bottom - 5, color, miniwin.pen_solid, 1) end
local function resize_message_window(win_id, width, visible_rows, save_now) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end
m.width = clamp(width, MIN_WIN_WIDTH, MAX_WIN_WIDTH) m.visible_rows = clamp(visible_rows, MIN_VISIBLE_ROWS, MAX_VISIBLE_ROWS) m.height = window_height(m.font_h, m.visible_rows)
WindowResize(win_id, m.width, m.height, COLOR_BG) move_title_hotspot(win_id) move_content_hotspot(win_id) move_scrollbar_hotspot(win_id) move_resize_hotspot(win_id) rebuild_visual_cache(win_id) if save_now then save_window_size(win_id) end
if win_id == CH_WIN then redraw_window(CH_WIN, "[ Channels ]", ch_visual_rows, ch_scroll) else redraw_window(TE_WIN, "[ Tells ]", te_visual_rows, te_scroll) end if WindowInfo(win_id, 5) then WindowShow(win_id, true) end end
local function scroll_window(win_id, amount) local previous = current_scroll(win_id) local new_scroll = set_current_scroll(win_id, previous + amount) if new_scroll ~= previous then redraw_message_window(win_id, true) end end
local function scroll_to_thumb_top(win_id, thumb_top, draw_now) local left, right, track_top, track_bottom, old_thumb_top, old_thumb_bottom, thumb_h = scrollbar_thumb_rect(win_id) if not left then return false end local max_scroll = max_scroll_for_window(win_id) if max_scroll <= 0 then return false end
local travel = math.max(1, (track_bottom - track_top) - thumb_h) local clamped_top = clamp(thumb_top, track_top, track_top + travel) local frac = (clamped_top - track_top) / travel local wanted_scroll = math.floor((1 - frac) * max_scroll + 0.5) local previous = current_scroll(win_id) local new_scroll = set_current_scroll(win_id, wanted_scroll) if new_scroll ~= previous and draw_now ~= false then redraw_message_window(win_id, true) end return new_scroll ~= previous end
local function begin_scrollbar_drag(win_id) local left, right, track_top, track_bottom, thumb_top, thumb_bottom, thumb_h = scrollbar_thumb_rect(win_id) if not left then return end boost_window(win_id)
local y = mouse_y_in_window(win_id) local offset if y >= thumb_top and y <= thumb_bottom then offset = y - thumb_top else offset = math.floor(thumb_h / 2) end
scrollbar_drag_state[win_id] = { offset = offset, last_refresh = 0, dirty = false } if scroll_to_thumb_top(win_id, y - offset, true) then scrollbar_drag_state[win_id].last_refresh = utils.timer() end end
local function drag_scrollbar(win_id, force) local state = scrollbar_drag_state[win_id] if not state then return end local y = mouse_y_in_window(win_id) local changed = scroll_to_thumb_top(win_id, y - state.offset, false) state.dirty = state.dirty or changed
local now = utils.timer() if force or (state.dirty and now - state.last_refresh >= SCROLL_DRAG_REFRESH) then redraw_message_window(win_id, force and "force" or true) state.last_refresh = now state.dirty = false end end
local function finish_scrollbar_drag(win_id) if not scrollbar_drag_state[win_id] then return end drag_scrollbar(win_id, false) scrollbar_drag_state[win_id] = nil redraw_message_window(win_id, "force") end
local function begin_resize(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end if window_manager_locked() then return end boost_window(win_id) resize_state[win_id] = { left = WindowInfo(win_id, 10), top = WindowInfo(win_id, 11), last_refresh = 0 } end
local function drag_resize(win_id, force) local state = resize_state[win_id] local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not state or not m then return end if window_manager_locked() then return end
local now = utils.timer() if not force and now - state.last_refresh < 0.033 then return end state.last_refresh = now
local new_width = WindowInfo(win_id, 17) - state.left local new_height = WindowInfo(win_id, 18) - state.top resize_message_window(win_id, new_width, rows_from_height(m.font_h, new_height), false) end
local function finish_resize(win_id) drag_resize(win_id, true) resize_state[win_id] = nil save_window_size(win_id) end
-- ==================== MINIWINDOW HELPERS ====================
function init_window(win_id, title, default_pos) local info = movewindow.install(win_id, default_pos, 0, false, nil, { dragmove = function() return window_manager_locked() end, }) local saved_width = tonumber(GetVariable(window_var(win_id, "width"))) or DEFAULT_WIN_WIDTH local saved_rows = tonumber(GetVariable(window_var(win_id, "rows"))) or DEFAULT_VISIBLE_ROWS local start_width = clamp(saved_width, MIN_WIN_WIDTH, MAX_WIN_WIDTH) local start_rows = clamp(saved_rows, MIN_VISIBLE_ROWS, MAX_VISIBLE_ROWS) -- Create with placeholder height first so WindowFont can be registered WindowCreate(win_id, info.window_left, info.window_top, start_width, window_height(FONT_SIZE + 4, start_rows), info.window_mode, info.window_flags, COLOR_BG) WindowFont(win_id, FONT_ID, FONT_NAME, FONT_SIZE, false, false, false, false) -- Now compute the real fixed height and resize once at init time only. -- Cache font metrics so redraws do not repeatedly ask MUSHclient for them. local font_h = WindowFontInfo(win_id, FONT_ID, 1) local visible_rows = start_rows local height = window_height(font_h, visible_rows) win_metrics[win_id] = { font_h = font_h, width = start_width, height = height, visible_rows = visible_rows, title_h = font_h + TEXT_INSET * 2 } WindowResize(win_id, start_width, height, COLOR_BG) local title_h = font_h + TEXT_INSET * 2 movewindow.add_drag_handler(win_id, 0, 0, start_width, title_h)
-- Content hotspot: covers the area BELOW the title bar. -- Handles scroll wheel, left-click-drag selection, and right-click menu. local s = win_id == CH_WIN and "ch" or "te" WindowAddHotspot(win_id, win_id .. "_scroll", 0, title_h, start_width - SCROLLBAR_W - 2, height - 1, "", "", "on_sel_down_" .. s, -- mousedown: start selection (left) or ignore (right) "", "on_sel_up_" .. s, -- mouseup: right-click opens menu "Wheel: scroll | Click-drag: select text | Right-click: menu", miniwin.cursor_ibeam, 0) WindowScrollwheelHandler(win_id, win_id .. "_scroll", "on_scroll_" .. s) -- Drag handler fires during left-button drag; separate from scroll wheel WindowDragHandler(win_id, win_id .. "_scroll", "on_sel_drag_" .. s, "on_sel_release_" .. s, 0x10) move_content_hotspot(win_id) move_scrollbar_hotspot(win_id) move_resize_hotspot(win_id)
redraw_window(win_id, title, {}, 0) end
register_with_window_manager = function(win_id) if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then CallPlugin(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, "registerMiniwindow", win_id) end end
boost_window = function(win_id) if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then CallPlugin(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, "boostMe", win_id) end end
local function style_text_colour(seg) return seg.textcolour or seg.textcolor or seg.forecolour or seg.foreground or COLOR_DEFAULT_TEXT end
local function styles_are_plain(styles) local seen_colour = nil for _, seg in ipairs(styles or {}) do local colour = style_text_colour(seg) if colour ~= COLOR_DEFAULT_TEXT then return false end seen_colour = colour end return seen_colour ~= nil end
local function tint_plain_styles(styles, colour) if not styles_are_plain(styles) then return styles end
local tinted = {} for _, seg in ipairs(styles) do tinted[#tinted + 1] = { text = seg.text or "", textcolour = colour, backcolour = seg.backcolour, style = seg.style, length = seg.length, } end return tinted end
local function mouse_x_in_window(win_id) local client_x = WindowInfo(win_id, 17) local window_left = WindowInfo(win_id, 10) if client_x and window_left then return client_x - window_left end return WindowInfo(win_id, 14) end
local function selection_for_window(win_id) return win_id == CH_WIN and ch_sel or te_sel end
local function normalized_selection(sel) if not sel or not sel.active or not sel.start_row or not sel.end_row then return nil end
local start_row, end_row = sel.start_row, sel.end_row local start_x, end_x = sel.start_x or TEXT_INSET, sel.end_x or TEXT_INSET if start_row > end_row or (start_row == end_row and start_x > end_x) then start_row, end_row = end_row, start_row start_x, end_x = end_x, start_x end return start_row, end_row, start_x, end_x end
local function selection_x_range_for_row(sel, row_index, text_right) local start_row, end_row, start_x, end_x = normalized_selection(sel) if not start_row or row_index < start_row or row_index > end_row then return nil end
start_x = clamp(start_x, TEXT_INSET, text_right) end_x = clamp(end_x, TEXT_INSET, text_right)
if start_row == end_row then return math.min(start_x, end_x), math.max(start_x, end_x) end if row_index == start_row then return start_x, text_right end if row_index == end_row then return TEXT_INSET, end_x end return TEXT_INSET, text_right end
-- Wrap a single message (array of styled segments) into visual rows. -- Returns a list of rows, each row being a list of {text, textcolour, backcolour} chunks. function wrap_styles(win_id, styles) local m = win_metrics[win_id] local width = m and m.width or DEFAULT_WIN_WIDTH local max_w = width - TEXT_INSET * 2 - SCROLLBAR_W - 2 local rows = {} local cur_row = {} local cur_x = 0
for _, seg in ipairs(styles) do local colour = style_text_colour(seg) local backcolour = seg.backcolour local text = seg.text or ""
-- Split segment into words, preserving spacing -- We iterate through space-delimited tokens but keep leading spaces attached local pos = 1 while pos <= #text do -- Find next word (including any leading spaces) local word_start = pos -- Skip spaces first (they stay with the preceding word end / start of segment) local spaces = text:match("^%s*", pos) pos = pos + #spaces if pos > #text then -- Only spaces remaining - attach to current row if #spaces > 0 then local sw = WindowTextWidth(win_id, FONT_ID, spaces) if cur_x + sw > max_w and cur_x > 0 then rows[#rows + 1] = cur_row cur_row = {} cur_x = 0 else cur_row[#cur_row + 1] = { text = spaces, textcolour = colour, backcolour = backcolour } cur_x = cur_x + sw end end break end -- Find end of word (up to next space or end of text) local word_end = text:find("%s", pos) local word if word_end then word = text:sub(pos, word_end - 1) pos = word_end else word = text:sub(pos) pos = #text + 1 end local full_token = spaces .. word local tw = WindowTextWidth(win_id, FONT_ID, full_token)
if cur_x + tw > max_w and cur_x > 0 then -- Wrap: start new row (drop leading spaces that caused the wrap) rows[#rows + 1] = cur_row cur_row = {} cur_x = 0 -- Re-measure just the word without leading spaces local ww = WindowTextWidth(win_id, FONT_ID, word) cur_row[#cur_row + 1] = { text = word, textcolour = colour, backcolour = backcolour } cur_x = ww else cur_row[#cur_row + 1] = { text = full_token, textcolour = colour, backcolour = backcolour } cur_x = cur_x + tw end end end
if #cur_row > 0 then rows[#rows + 1] = cur_row end
-- Always return at least one (possibly empty) row if #rows == 0 then rows[1] = {} end return rows end
-- all_rows must be a pre-expanded table of wrapped visual rows (from the incremental cache). -- The cache is updated in add_line (new message only, not a full rebuild). Never call wrap_styles here. -- Uses cached font metrics from init, so redraws avoid repeated WindowFontInfo calls. function redraw_window(win_id, title, all_rows, scroll_offset) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return end local width = m.width local h = m.height local FONT_H = m.font_h local visible_rows = m.visible_rows local total = #all_rows
-- Clamp scroll offset local max_scroll = math.max(0, total - visible_rows) scroll_offset = math.max(0, math.min(scroll_offset, max_scroll))
-- Compute the visible range: show the current row count ending at (total - scroll_offset) local bottom = total - scroll_offset local top = math.max(1, bottom - visible_rows + 1)
-- Clear background WindowRectOp(win_id, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, width, h, COLOR_BG)
-- Border WindowRectOp(win_id, miniwin.rect_frame, 0, 0, width, h, COLOR_BORDER)
-- Title bar with optional scroll indicator local display_title = title if scroll_offset > 0 then display_title = title .. " ^ " .. scroll_offset .. " rows above" end WindowText(win_id, FONT_ID, display_title, TEXT_INSET, TEXT_INSET, width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET, 0, COLOR_TITLE)
-- Render visible rows directly from all_rows (no intermediate display table) local text_right = width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET local sel = selection_for_window(win_id) local row_num = 0 for i = top, bottom do row_num = row_num + 1 local y = row_num * FONT_H + TEXT_INSET local x = TEXT_INSET local select_x1, select_x2 = selection_x_range_for_row(sel, i, text_right) if select_x1 and select_x2 and select_x2 > select_x1 then WindowRectOp(win_id, miniwin.rect_fill, select_x1, y, select_x2, y + FONT_H, COLOR_SELECT_BG) end local row = all_rows[i] for _, chunk in ipairs(row) do local chunk_w = WindowTextWidth(win_id, FONT_ID, chunk.text) if chunk.backcolour and chunk.backcolour ~= COLOR_BG then WindowRectOp(win_id, miniwin.rect_fill, x, y, math.min(text_right, x + chunk_w), y + FONT_H, chunk.backcolour) end local w = WindowText(win_id, FONT_ID, chunk.text, x, y, text_right, y + FONT_H, chunk.textcolour) x = x + w end end
-- Draw scrollbar (right edge, below the title bar and above the resize handle) local sb_left, sb_right, sb_top, sb_bot, thumb_top, thumb_bot = scrollbar_thumb_rect(win_id) if sb_left then WindowRectOp(win_id, miniwin.rect_fill, sb_left, sb_top, sb_right, sb_bot, COLOR_SCROLL) if total > visible_rows then local thumb_color = scrollbar_drag_state[win_id] and COLOR_THUMB_HOT or COLOR_THUMB WindowRectOp(win_id, miniwin.rect_fill, sb_left, thumb_top, sb_right, thumb_bot, thumb_color) end end draw_resize_tag(win_id) -- No WindowShow here - window stays visible from init; calling it repeatedly triggers OS repaints end
function add_line(buf, styles) -- Identify which window, cache, and count-table we're updating local win_id, vis_rows, row_counts if buf == ch_lines then win_id = CH_WIN vis_rows = ch_visual_rows row_counts = ch_row_counts else win_id = TE_WIN vis_rows = te_visual_rows row_counts = te_row_counts end
-- Evict oldest message when buffer is full: trim exactly its row count from the front of the cache if #buf >= MAX_STORED then table.remove(buf, 1) local evict = table.remove(row_counts, 1) or 0 for _ = 1, evict do table.remove(vis_rows, 1) end end
-- Wrap only the new message and append its rows to the cache (O(new-message) not O(all-messages)) local display_styles = stamp_display_styles(styles) table.insert(buf, display_styles) local new_rows = wrap_styles(win_id, display_styles) table.insert(row_counts, #new_rows) for _, row in ipairs(new_rows) do vis_rows[#vis_rows + 1] = row end
-- Snap to newest and clear any selection (selected row indices are now stale) if buf == ch_lines then ch_scroll = 0 ch_sel = { active = false } ch_last_drag_row = nil ch_last_drag_x = nil else te_scroll = 0 te_sel = { active = false } te_last_drag_row = nil te_last_drag_x = nil end end
function toggle_msg_windows() local ch_vis = WindowInfo(CH_WIN, 5) local te_vis = WindowInfo(TE_WIN, 5) -- Hide all if any visible; show all only if both are hidden local show = not (ch_vis or te_vis) WindowShow(CH_WIN, show) WindowShow(TE_WIN, show) end
local function show_msg_windows() WindowShow(CH_WIN, true) WindowShow(TE_WIN, true) end
function set_logging(name, line, wildcards) local setting = wildcards[1] if setting == "on" then log_messages = 1 elseif setting == "off" then log_messages = 0 end SetVariable("log_messages", tostring(log_messages)) ColourNote((log_messages == 1) and "lime" or "yellow", "", "Message Router logging is " .. ((log_messages == 1) and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") end
function set_bell(name, line, wildcards) local setting = wildcards[1] if setting == "on" then bell_on_tell = 1 elseif setting == "off" then bell_on_tell = 0 end SetVariable("bell_on_tell", tostring(bell_on_tell)) ColourNote((bell_on_tell == 1) and "lime" or "yellow", "", "Tell bell sound is " .. ((bell_on_tell == 1) and "ON" or "OFF") .. ".") end
function set_timestamp_format(name, line, wildcards) local setting = trim(wildcards[1] or "") local lower = setting:lower()
if setting == "" then local current = timestamp_format ~= "" and timestamp_format or "off" ColourNote("cyan", "", "Message Router miniwindow timestamp format: " .. current) ColourNote("khaki", "", " msgtimestamp off") ColourNote("khaki", "", " msgtimestamp short") ColourNote("khaki", "", " msgtimestamp 12") ColourNote("khaki", "", " msgtimestamp iso") ColourNote("khaki", "", " msgtimestamp date") ColourNote("khaki", "", " msgtimestamp [%H:%M:%S] ") return end
if lower == "off" or lower == "none" then set_timestamp_choice("", "off") elseif lower == "short" or lower == "24" then set_timestamp_choice("[%H:%M:%S] ", "13:29:08") elseif lower == "12" or lower == "ampm" then set_timestamp_choice("[%I:%M:%S %p] ", "01:29:08 PM") elseif lower == "iso" then set_timestamp_choice("[%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S] ", "2026-06-15 13:29:08") elseif lower == "date" then set_timestamp_choice("[%d %b %H:%M:%S] ", "15 Jun 13:29:08") else set_timestamp_choice(setting, setting) end end
function allow_angle_channel(name, line, wildcards) local channel = wildcards[1]:lower() custom_angle_channels[channel] = true blocked_angle_channels[channel] = nil save_channel_overrides() ColourNote("lime", "", "Message Router will treat <" .. channel .. "> as a channel.") end
function block_angle_channel(name, line, wildcards) local channel = wildcards[1]:lower() custom_angle_channels[channel] = nil blocked_angle_channels[channel] = true save_channel_overrides() ColourNote("yellow", "", "Message Router will not treat <" .. channel .. "> as a channel.") end
function unblock_angle_channel(name, line, wildcards) local channel = wildcards[1]:lower() blocked_angle_channels[channel] = nil save_channel_overrides() ColourNote("lime", "", "Removed the custom block for <" .. channel .. ">.") end
function list_channel_overrides() print("") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Message Router channel overrides:") local allowed = join_keys(custom_angle_channels) local blocked = join_keys(blocked_angle_channels) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Custom allowed: " .. ((allowed ~= "") and allowed or "(none)")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Custom blocked: " .. ((blocked ~= "") and blocked or "(none)")) print("") end
function reset_window_positions() local function update_movewindow_info(win_id, x, y) local info = _G["mw_" .. win_id .. "_movewindow_info"] if info then info.window_left = x info.window_top = y info.window_mode = 0 info.window_flags = miniwin.create_absolute_location end end
-- Read current positions of the two windows local ch_x = WindowInfo(CH_WIN, 10) -- left edge local ch_y = WindowInfo(CH_WIN, 11) -- top edge local te_x = WindowInfo(TE_WIN, 10) local te_y = WindowInfo(TE_WIN, 11)
-- Swap the Y positions (keep X the same), move immediately WindowPosition(CH_WIN, ch_x, te_y, 0, miniwin.create_absolute_location) WindowPosition(TE_WIN, te_x, ch_y, 0, miniwin.create_absolute_location) update_movewindow_info(CH_WIN, ch_x, te_y) update_movewindow_info(TE_WIN, te_x, ch_y)
-- Update the saved variables to match the new positions so they survive reload SetVariable("mw_" .. CH_WIN .. "_windowx", tostring(ch_x)) SetVariable("mw_" .. CH_WIN .. "_windowy", tostring(te_y)) SetVariable("mw_" .. CH_WIN .. "_windowflags", "2") SetVariable("mw_" .. TE_WIN .. "_windowx", tostring(te_x)) SetVariable("mw_" .. TE_WIN .. "_windowy", tostring(ch_y)) SetVariable("mw_" .. TE_WIN .. "_windowflags", "2")
ColourNote("cyan", "", "Message Router: windows swapped. Tells=top, Channels=bottom.") register_with_window_manager(CH_WIN) register_with_window_manager(TE_WIN) end
function set_window_size(name, line, wildcards) local target = wildcards[1] local width = tonumber(wildcards[2]) local rows = tonumber(wildcards[3])
if target == "channels" or target == "both" then resize_message_window(CH_WIN, width, rows, true) end if target == "tells" or target == "both" then resize_message_window(TE_WIN, width, rows, true) end
ColourNote("lime", "", "Message Router: resized " .. target .. " to " .. clamp(width, MIN_WIN_WIDTH, MAX_WIN_WIDTH) .. " px wide and " .. clamp(rows, MIN_VISIBLE_ROWS, MAX_VISIBLE_ROWS) .. " visible rows.") end
-- Scroll wheel callbacks (global names required by WindowScrollwheelHandler) -- Use pre-cached visual rows â no expand_to_rows here, so scrolling is instant. function on_scroll_ch(flags, hotspot_id) if bit.band(flags, 0x100) ~= 0 then scroll_window(CH_WIN, -SCROLL_LINES) else scroll_window(CH_WIN, SCROLL_LINES) end end
function on_scroll_te(flags, hotspot_id) if bit.band(flags, 0x100) ~= 0 then scroll_window(TE_WIN, -SCROLL_LINES) else scroll_window(TE_WIN, SCROLL_LINES) end end
function on_scrollbar_down_ch(flags, id) begin_scrollbar_drag(CH_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_drag_ch(flags, id) drag_scrollbar(CH_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_release_ch(flags, id) finish_scrollbar_drag(CH_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_up_ch(flags, id) finish_scrollbar_drag(CH_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_down_te(flags, id) begin_scrollbar_drag(TE_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_drag_te(flags, id) drag_scrollbar(TE_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_release_te(flags, id) finish_scrollbar_drag(TE_WIN) end
function on_scrollbar_up_te(flags, id) finish_scrollbar_drag(TE_WIN) end
-- ==================== SELECTION HELPERS ====================
-- Map a pixel Y within win_id to an absolute index into the visual row cache. -- Returns nil if the Y is in the title bar or outside the content area. -- WindowInfo(win, 14/15) returns cursor X/Y within the window (confirmed from movewindow.lua). local function y_to_abs_row(win_id, y) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return nil end local vis_rows = win_id == CH_WIN and ch_visual_rows or te_visual_rows local scroll = win_id == CH_WIN and ch_scroll or te_scroll local total = #vis_rows local visible_rows = m.visible_rows
-- row_in_view: 0 = title bar area, 1..visible_rows = content rows local row_in_view = math.floor((y - TEXT_INSET) / m.font_h) if row_in_view < 1 or row_in_view > visible_rows then return nil end
local max_scroll = math.max(0, total - visible_rows) local clamped = math.max(0, math.min(scroll, max_scroll)) local bottom = total - clamped local top = math.max(1, bottom - visible_rows + 1)
local abs = top + (row_in_view - 1) if abs < 1 or abs > total then return nil end return abs end
local function row_plain_text(row) local parts = {} for _, chunk in ipairs(row or {}) do parts[#parts + 1] = chunk.text or "" end return table.concat(parts) end
local function text_slice_for_pixels(win_id, text, chunk_left, wanted_left, wanted_right) text = text or "" if text == "" or wanted_right <= chunk_left then return "" end
local out = {} local last_x = chunk_left for i = 1, #text do local next_x = chunk_left + WindowTextWidth(win_id, FONT_ID, text:sub(1, i)) if next_x > wanted_left and last_x < wanted_right then out[#out + 1] = text:sub(i, i) end last_x = next_x if last_x >= wanted_right then break end end return table.concat(out) end
local function row_text_for_x_range(win_id, row, x1, x2) local x = TEXT_INSET local parts = {} for _, chunk in ipairs(row or {}) do local text = chunk.text or "" local w = WindowTextWidth(win_id, FONT_ID, text) if x + w > x1 and x < x2 then parts[#parts + 1] = text_slice_for_pixels(win_id, text, x, x1, x2) end x = x + w if x >= x2 then break end end return table.concat(parts) end
local function selected_text(win_id) local sel = selection_for_window(win_id) local vis = visual_rows_for_window(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] if not m then return "" end
local text_right = m.width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET local start_row, end_row = normalized_selection(sel) if not start_row then return "" end
local lines = {} for row = start_row, end_row do if vis[row] then local x1, x2 = selection_x_range_for_row(sel, row, text_right) if x1 and x2 and x2 > x1 then lines[#lines + 1] = row_text_for_x_range(win_id, vis[row], x1, x2) end end end return table.concat(lines, "\n") end
local function visible_text(win_id) local m = win_metrics[win_id] local vis = visual_rows_for_window(win_id) if not m then return "" end
local total = #vis local scroll = current_scroll(win_id) local bottom = total - scroll local top = math.max(1, bottom - m.visible_rows + 1) local lines = {} for row = top, bottom do if vis[row] then lines[#lines + 1] = row_plain_text(vis[row]) end end return table.concat(lines, "\n") end
local function all_text(win_id) local vis = visual_rows_for_window(win_id) local lines = {} for _, row in ipairs(vis) do lines[#lines + 1] = row_plain_text(row) end return table.concat(lines, "\n") end
local function copy_text(label, text) if not text or text == "" then ColourNote("yellow", "", "[Message Router] Nothing to copy.") return end
local ok, err = pcall(SetClipboard, text) if ok then ColourNote("cyan", "", "[Message Router] Copied " .. label .. " to clipboard.") else ColourNote("red", "", "[Message Router] Copy failed: " .. tostring(err)) end end
local function current_log_prefix() return log_directory_base .. os.date("%y_%b_") end
local function last_lines_text(text, wanted) wanted = clamp(tonumber(wanted) or 100, 1, 1000) local lines = {} for line in (text or ""):gmatch("([^\n]*)\n?") do if line ~= "" then lines[#lines + 1] = line end end
local start = math.max(1, #lines - wanted + 1) local out = {} for i = start, #lines do out[#out + 1] = lines[i] end return table.concat(out, "\n") end
local function read_file(path) local f = io.open(path, "r") if not f then return nil end local text = f:read("*a") or "" f:close() return text end
local function copy_recent_file(label, path, line_count) local text = read_file(path) if not text or text == "" then ColourNote("yellow", "", "[Message Router] No log text found at: " .. path) return end copy_text(label, last_lines_text(text, line_count)) end
function show_log_path() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Message Router logs") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Folder: " .. log_directory_base) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Current filename prefix: " .. os.date("%y_%b_")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Tells log: " .. current_log_prefix() .. "active_tells.txt") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Last tells log: " .. current_log_prefix() .. "last_tells.txt") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Channel logs: " .. current_log_prefix() .. "active_<channel>.txt") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Logging: " .. (log_messages == 1 and "on" or "off")) print("") end
function copy_recent_log(name, line, wildcards) local target = ((wildcards and wildcards[1]) or "tells"):lower() local line_count = tonumber(wildcards and wildcards[2]) or 100 local prefix = current_log_prefix()
if target == "tells" then copy_recent_file("recent tells log", prefix .. "active_tells.txt", line_count) elseif target == "lasttells" then copy_recent_file("recent last-tells log", prefix .. "last_tells.txt", line_count) elseif target == "channels" then copy_text("recent channel window history", last_lines_text(all_text(CH_WIN), line_count)) elseif target == "all" then local text = "Channels:\n" .. last_lines_text(all_text(CH_WIN), line_count) .. "\n\nTells:\n" .. last_lines_text(all_text(TE_WIN), line_count) copy_text("recent message-window history", text) else ColourNote("yellow", "", "[Message Router] Use: msgcopylog tells|lasttells|channels|all [lines]") end end
local function show_context_menu(win_id) local sel = selection_for_window(win_id) local menu = {} local actions = {}
local function add(label, fn) menu[#menu + 1] = label actions[#actions + 1] = fn end
local function raw(label) menu[#menu + 1] = label end
if sel and sel.active and sel.start_row and sel.end_row then add("Copy Selected Text", function() copy_text("selected text", selected_text(win_id)) end) add("Clear Selection", function() clear_selection(win_id) redraw_message_window(win_id, "force") end) else raw("^Copy Selected Text") raw("^Clear Selection") end add("Copy Visible Text", function() copy_text("visible text", visible_text(win_id)) end) add("Copy All Text", function() copy_text("all text", all_text(win_id)) end) raw("-") raw(">Timestamps") add(((timestamp_format == "") and "+" or "") .. "Off", function() set_timestamp_choice("", "off") end) add(((timestamp_format == "[%H:%M:%S] ") and "+" or "") .. "13:29:08", function() set_timestamp_choice("[%H:%M:%S] ", "13:29:08") end) add(((timestamp_format == "[%I:%M:%S %p] ") and "+" or "") .. "01:29:08 PM", function() set_timestamp_choice("[%I:%M:%S %p] ", "01:29:08 PM") end) add(((timestamp_format == "[%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S] ") and "+" or "") .. "2026-06-15 13:29:08", function() set_timestamp_choice("[%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S] ", "2026-06-15 13:29:08") end) add(((timestamp_format == "[%d %b %H:%M:%S] ") and "+" or "") .. "15 Jun 13:29:08", function() set_timestamp_choice("[%d %b %H:%M:%S] ", "15 Jun 13:29:08") end) raw("<") raw("-") add((log_messages == 1 and "+" or "") .. "File Logging", function() log_messages = (log_messages == 1) and 0 or 1 SetVariable("log_messages", tostring(log_messages)) ColourNote(log_messages == 1 and "lime" or "yellow", "", "[Message Router] File logging is " .. (log_messages == 1 and "ON." or "OFF.")) end) add("Show Log Path", show_log_path) add("Copy Recent Tells Log", function() copy_recent_log("", "", { "tells", "100" }) end) add((bell_on_tell == 1 and "+" or "") .. "Tell Bell", function() bell_on_tell = (bell_on_tell == 1) and 0 or 1 SetVariable("bell_on_tell", tostring(bell_on_tell)) ColourNote(bell_on_tell == 1 and "lime" or "yellow", "", "[Message Router] Tell bell is " .. (bell_on_tell == 1 and "ON." or "OFF.")) end) if window_manager_locked() then add("+Window Lock", function() call_window_manager("unlockWindows") end) else add("Window Lock", function() call_window_manager("lockWindows") end) end
local result = tonumber(WindowMenu(win_id, WindowInfo(win_id, 14), WindowInfo(win_id, 15), "!" .. table.concat(menu, "|"))) if result and actions[result] then actions[result]() end end
local function finalize_selection(win_id) local sel = selection_for_window(win_id) if not sel or not sel.active then return end
if selected_text(win_id) == "" then clear_selection(win_id) end redraw_message_window(win_id, "force") end
-- ==================== SELECTION CALLBACKS ==================== -- All callbacks must be global functions (WindowDragHandler / WindowAddHotspot requirement). -- WindowInfo(win, 14) = cursor X within window; WindowInfo(win, 15) = cursor Y within window.
function on_resize_down_ch(flags, id) begin_resize(CH_WIN) end
function on_resize_drag_ch(flags, id) drag_resize(CH_WIN) end
function on_resize_release_ch(flags, id) finish_resize(CH_WIN) end
function on_resize_down_te(flags, id) begin_resize(TE_WIN) end
function on_resize_drag_te(flags, id) drag_resize(TE_WIN) end
function on_resize_release_te(flags, id) finish_resize(TE_WIN) end
function on_sel_down_ch(flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then return end boost_window(CH_WIN) ch_last_drag_row = nil ch_last_drag_x = nil local row = y_to_abs_row(CH_WIN, mouse_y_in_window(CH_WIN)) if row then local text_right = win_metrics[CH_WIN].width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET local x = clamp(mouse_x_in_window(CH_WIN), TEXT_INSET, text_right) ch_sel = { active = true, start_row = row, end_row = row, start_x = x, end_x = x } redraw_message_window(CH_WIN, "force") end end
function on_sel_up_ch(flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then boost_window(CH_WIN) show_context_menu(CH_WIN) end end
function on_sel_drag_ch(flags, id) if not ch_sel.active then return end local row = y_to_abs_row(CH_WIN, mouse_y_in_window(CH_WIN)) if row then local text_right = win_metrics[CH_WIN].width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET local x = clamp(mouse_x_in_window(CH_WIN), TEXT_INSET, text_right) if row ~= ch_last_drag_row or x ~= ch_last_drag_x then ch_last_drag_row = row ch_last_drag_x = x ch_sel.end_row = row ch_sel.end_x = x redraw_message_window(CH_WIN, true) end end end
function on_sel_release_ch(flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then return end finalize_selection(CH_WIN) end
function on_sel_down_te(flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then return end boost_window(TE_WIN) te_last_drag_row = nil te_last_drag_x = nil local row = y_to_abs_row(TE_WIN, mouse_y_in_window(TE_WIN)) if row then local text_right = win_metrics[TE_WIN].width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET local x = clamp(mouse_x_in_window(TE_WIN), TEXT_INSET, text_right) te_sel = { active = true, start_row = row, end_row = row, start_x = x, end_x = x } redraw_message_window(TE_WIN, "force") end end
function on_sel_up_te(flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then boost_window(TE_WIN) show_context_menu(TE_WIN) end end
function on_sel_drag_te(flags, id) if not te_sel.active then return end local row = y_to_abs_row(TE_WIN, mouse_y_in_window(TE_WIN)) if row then local text_right = win_metrics[TE_WIN].width - SCROLLBAR_W - TEXT_INSET local x = clamp(mouse_x_in_window(TE_WIN), TEXT_INSET, text_right) if row ~= te_last_drag_row or x ~= te_last_drag_x then te_last_drag_row = row te_last_drag_x = x te_sel.end_row = row te_sel.end_x = x redraw_message_window(TE_WIN, true) end end end
function on_sel_release_te(flags, id) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then return end finalize_selection(TE_WIN) end
-- ==================== ROUTING FUNCTIONS ====================
function route_channel(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- If wildcards[2] exists, it means the pattern with player name matched (channel is in [2]) -- Otherwise, the pattern without player name matched (channel is in [1]) local channel_name = (wildcards[2] or wildcards[1]):lower()
-- Check if angle brackets are used - if so, verify channel is in whitelist if line:match("<" .. channel_name .. ">") then if not is_angle_channel(channel_name) then -- Not a valid channel, re-output the line normally for _, v in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(v.textcolour), RGBColourToName(v.backcolour), v.text) end Note("") return end end
-- Log the channel message -- Skip logging for btest channel (not sent to Discord) if log_messages == 1 and channel_name ~= "btest" then local dir = get_log_directory() local f = io.open(dir .. "active_" .. channel_name .. ".txt", "a") if f then f:write(line .. "\n") f:close() end end
-- Send to channels miniwindow add_line(ch_lines, styles) redraw_window(CH_WIN, "[ Channels ]", ch_visual_rows, ch_scroll) end
function last_route_channel(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Pattern has player name in [1] and channel name in [2] local channel_name = (wildcards[2] or wildcards[1]):lower()
-- Check if angle brackets are used - if so, verify channel is in whitelist if line:match("<" .. channel_name .. ">") then if not is_angle_channel(channel_name) then -- Not a valid channel, re-output the line normally for _, v in ipairs(styles) do ColourTell(RGBColourToName(v.textcolour), RGBColourToName(v.backcolour), v.text) end Note("") return end end
-- Log to last log with deduplication -- Skip logging for btest channel (not sent to Discord) if log_messages == 1 and channel_name ~= "btest" then local dir = get_log_directory() local last_log_file = dir .. "last_" .. channel_name .. ".txt"
local all = "" local f = io.open(last_log_file, "r") if f then all = f:read("*a") or "" f:close() end
-- Add timestamp if needed local line_to_write if not line:find("^%w+%s%d+%s.*$") then local now = os.time() line_to_write = os.date("%b %d", now + zombie_time_zone_offset) .. " " .. line else line_to_write = line end
-- Deduplicate: only write if not already in file if all == "" or not all:find(line_to_write, 0, true) then local a = io.open(last_log_file, "a") if a then a:write(line_to_write .. "\n") a:close() end end end
-- Send to channels miniwindow add_line(ch_lines, styles) redraw_window(CH_WIN, "[ Channels ]", ch_visual_rows, ch_scroll) end
function route_tell_incoming(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Play bell if configured if bell_on_tell == 1 then Sound("ding.wav") end
-- Log the tell (without timestamp for Discord compatibility) if log_messages == 1 then local dir = get_log_directory() local f = io.open(dir .. "active_tells.txt", "a") if f then f:write(line .. "\n") f:close() end end
-- Send to tells miniwindow add_line(te_lines, tint_plain_styles(styles, COLOR_TELL_IN)) redraw_window(TE_WIN, "[ Tells ]", te_visual_rows, te_scroll) end
function route_tell_outgoing(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Log the tell (without timestamp for Discord compatibility) if log_messages == 1 then local dir = get_log_directory() local f = io.open(dir .. "active_tells.txt", "a") if f then f:write(line .. "\n") f:close() end end
-- Send to tells miniwindow add_line(te_lines, tint_plain_styles(styles, COLOR_TELL_OUT)) redraw_window(TE_WIN, "[ Tells ]", te_visual_rows, te_scroll) end
function last_route_tell(name, line, wildcards, styles) -- Log to last log with deduplication if log_messages == 1 then local dir = get_log_directory() local last_log_file = dir .. "last_tells.txt"
local all = "" local f = io.open(last_log_file, "r") if f then all = f:read("*a") or "" f:close() end
-- Add timestamp if needed local line_to_write if not line:find("^%w+%s%d+%s.*$") then local now = os.time() line_to_write = os.date("%b %d", now + zombie_time_zone_offset) .. " " .. line else line_to_write = line end
-- Deduplicate: only write if not already in file if all == "" or not all:find(line_to_write, 0, true) then local a = io.open(last_log_file, "a") if a then a:write(line_to_write .. "\n") a:close() end end end
-- Send to tells miniwindow add_line(te_lines, tint_plain_styles(styles, COLOR_TELL_IN)) redraw_window(TE_WIN, "[ Tells ]", te_visual_rows, te_scroll) end
-- ==================== PLUGIN EVENTS ====================
function OnPluginInstall() init_window(TE_WIN, "[ Tells ]", miniwin.pos_top_right) init_window(CH_WIN, "[ Channels ]", miniwin.pos_bottom_right) register_with_window_manager(TE_WIN) register_with_window_manager(CH_WIN) show_msg_windows() if IsPluginInstalled("94925710eda2ee22c3a5fd4a") and GetPluginVariable("94925710eda2ee22c3a5fd4a", "startup_mode") == "verbose" then ColourNote("cyan", "", "Message Router v4.0 loaded - Aardwolf-style text selection, timestamps, right-click menu, and log helpers") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Channels window: top-right | Tells window: bottom-right") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Drag the lower-right corner to resize, or use: msgsize channels|tells|both width rows") ColourNote("cyan", "", "Type 'msgwin' to toggle both windows on/off")
if log_messages == 1 then ColourNote("green", "", "Logging enabled: " .. get_log_directory()) else ColourNote("yellow", "", "Logging disabled") end
if bell_on_tell == 1 then ColourNote("green", "", "Bell sound on incoming tells: ENABLED") end end end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("log_messages", tostring(log_messages)) SetVariable("bell_on_tell", tostring(bell_on_tell)) SetVariable("timestamp_format", timestamp_format) save_channel_overrides() save_window_size(CH_WIN) save_window_size(TE_WIN) movewindow.save_state(CH_WIN) movewindow.save_state(TE_WIN) end
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if id == ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID and msg == 996 and text == "re-register z" then register_with_window_manager(TE_WIN) register_with_window_manager(CH_WIN) elseif msg == 997 and text == "reset z windows" then reset_window_positions() end end
function OnPluginClose() WindowShow(CH_WIN, false) WindowShow(TE_WIN, false) end
